task.title: Infrastructure Setup
task.description: Set up PostgreSQL and Redis infrastructure with proper networking, storage, and monitoring for the alert management system

implementation.details: 1. Deploy PostgreSQL cluster with persistent storage 2. Deploy Redis cluster for caching and real-time state 3. Configure networking between services 4. Set up monitoring and health checks 5. Create namespaces and RBAC policies 6. Configure backup strategies for PostgreSQL

decision.description: PostgreSQL deployment strategy - single instance vs cluster

task.acceptance_criteria: Verify PostgreSQL accepts connections and can create databases. Confirm Redis cluster is operational with basic set/get operations. Validate persistent storage is properly mounted and accessible.
